case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION:$500.00 U.S. et al

docket_entries.description: DISCOVERY 610, PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO PETITIONER'S FIRST SET OF DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, FIRST SET OF SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, AND FORM INTERROGATORIES IS GRANTED. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT FORM OF ORDER. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT. NOT REPORTED.
POS OF PETITION FOR FORFEITURE IN REM FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
MINI-MINUTES FOR APR-07-2010 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

PETITION FOR FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION:$500.00 U.S. CURRENCY DOES 1 THROUGH 100 INCLUSIVE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

NTC AND MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO PETITIONER'S FIRST SET OF DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS; PETITIONER'S FIRST SET OF SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES; JUDICIAL COUNCIL FORM INTERROGATORIES, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA HEARING SET FOR APR-07-2010 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT 610
STIPULATION TO JUDGMENT FILED BY PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA THORNSBERRY, SYLVIA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $100.00 BE RELEASED CLAIMANT SYLVIA THORNSBERRY. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $400.00 PLUS INTEREST SINCE DATE OF DEPOSIT IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PURSUANT TO H&S 11470 ET SEQ AND DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY H&S 11489. ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION CONCERNING THE SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF THIS FORFEITURE IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES. ANY STIPULATIONS WHICH STAYED THIS FORFEITURE PROCEEDING IS RELEASED. CLAIMANT WAIVES HIS/HER RIGHT TO HAVE SAME JUDGE OR JURY DECIDE BOTH THE CRIMINAL AND FORFEITURE CASE. CLAIMANT WAIVES CONDITION PRECEDENT TO THIS FORFEITURE. PARTIES SHALL BEAR THEIR COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
ORDER COMPELLING ANSWERS TO FIRST SET OF DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION AND INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS

calendar.matters:
Ntc And Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioner'S First Set Of Demand For Production Of Documents; Petitioner'S First Set Of Special Interrogatories; Judicial Council Form Interrogatories
Off Calendar Apr-07-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted. PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA's Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioner's First Set Of Demand For Production Of Documents, First Set Of Special Interrogatories, and Form Interrogatories is granted. No opposition has been filed. Respondent is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported.
